text.title: Value Proposition Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Value Proposition Design. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: build-customer-profile
step.action: List jobs / pains / gains with ≥1 citation each.

step.name: draft-value-map
step.action: Map products → pain_relievers / gain_creators with refs to profile ids.

step.name: compute-alignment-gaps
step.action: List every pain/gain with no matching reliever/creator.

step.name: write-job-anchored-statement
step.action: Draft ≤140 char statement citing a named job.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
